center.name: 沃爾特·布勒
center.summary: 沃爾特·布勒是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括灰鸭、Australasian bittern、查岛鸲鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Keulemans]] in Buller's A History of the Birds of New Zealand | status = VU | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Botaurus | species = poiciloptilus | authority = (Wagler, 1827) | range_map = Botaurus poiciloptilus map.svg | range_map_caption = Global range }} The Australasian bittern (Botaurus poiciloptilus), or in Māori, is a stocky, sizeable and elusive heron-like bird native to the wetlands of Australia, New Zealand, and New Caledonia.Heather, B
